  Replaced the destructive clear_log.sh / clear_logs.sh cron jobs on Edgar production hosts (seni_ror, seni_sk) with standard logrotate for proper log rotation and retention.

  - Created config/logrotate/sentiment_importer.conf (daily rotation, 7-day retention, compression, su ubuntu ubuntu)
  - Created scripts/setup_logrotate.sh (one-shot deploy + crontab cleanup)
  - Updated README.md with logrotate docs + health check one-liner
  - Updated AGENT_WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md with health check + logrotate section
  - Installed and verified on both seni_ror and seni_sk
  - Removed old clear_log.sh / clear_logs.sh crontab entries
  - Added weekly journal vacuum (journalctl --vacuum-time=3d)
  
  ### agentic_ai_context
  - Updated WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md with Edgar production log management + health check reference
  
  Time spent: 30 minutes
